sections.heading: 1. Driver Partner Agreement
sections.text: By registering as a driver partner on Happy Rider's Crew, you agree to follow all local traffic laws, maintain valid documents, and represent the community professionally.

sections.heading: 2. Vehicle and Insurance
sections.text: Your vehicle must be properly insured. You consent to background and document verification.

sections.heading: 3. Account Suspension
sections.text: We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate the safety code of conduct, receive excessive negative ratings, or engage in fraudulent activity.
